name: Indole-3-carbinol
summary: Indole-3-carbinol is a indole compound associated with cruciferous vegetables. Evidence level: moderate.
description: Indole-3-carbinol is cataloged as a indole compound. Reported mechanism notes: Modulates estrogen metabolism (human-supported via downstream metabolites such as DIM formed in vivo); additional mechanisms (preclinical).
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
